name: Plan Genie Lite
description:
Plan Genie Lite brings clarity to your early ideas by transforming unstructured thoughts into clean strategic summaries. Ideal for startups and learners.

Features
Simple guided planning workspace
Helpful prompts to structure ideas
Basic AI refinement
Simple dashboards with progress tracking
Clean and shareable exports
Easy upgrade path into Pro
Best for startups, students, side hustles, first-time planners

name: Plan Genie Pro
description:
Best for entrepreneurs growing businesses, startups, and teams that want a business intelligence hub with financial visibility, collaboration, and accountability in one place.

$100
/month
First user seat included. Add more users anytime.
Everything in Plan Genie Lite
Full strategic planning workspace
Advanced AI infrastructure built in
Advanced dashboards with milestones and progress tracking
Team collaboration features
Expert informed strategic guidance and priority support
Financial forecasting tools
Access to live implementation services

name: Facilitated workshops
